action.reasoning: Observation: empty workspace. Analysis: need establish a valid end-to-end pipeline immediately per instructions. A strong non-learning baseline for this deterministic exploration task is graph-based frontier/utility planning using ExplorationEnv observations: build the current exploration graph, compute shortest paths from robot to all utility-positive nodes, and move to the first neighbor on the path to the best utility-distance tradeoff. Decision: write model/train/predict scripts, run a very short parameter search on a few training maps, save the best heuristic config, and submit evaluation immediately to validate compatibility and get a baseline score/time.

command_output.stdout: Saved heuristic planner to checkpoints/baseline with train_score=0.7617
